metadata.description: Soul — pre-flight audit skill for Claude Code. Classifies task domain, loads process+domain skills, checks MCPs, and auto-installs marketplace plugins per a trusted-owner allowlist.

plugins.name: soul
plugins.description: Pre-flight audit run before any execution. Identifies domain, invokes process skills (brainstorming/TDD/debugging/verification) and domain skills, checks MCPs, and auto-installs missing marketplace plugins from trusted owners.
